title: Calm: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Calm is a yoga and wellness studio where every class meets you where you are, from your first stretch to your strongest pose.
From gentle flows to deep stillness, our classes support your body and quiet your mind.
cards: Slow, mindful sequences that build strength without strain.
Deep relaxation classes that release tension and reset your nervous system.
Wake up with bright, breath-led sessions to start your day grounded.
Capped class sizes so every student gets real attention and care.
Guided breathwork to calm anxiety and sharpen your focus.
Classes morning to evening, seven days a week, around your life.

sections.text: Step off the street and into a warm, light-filled studio designed to slow your breath the moment you arrive.
bullets: Quiet lounge for before and after

sections.text: Our certified instructors offer hands-on adjustments and gentle modifications, so every body finds its own version of the pose.

sections.sub: No experience needed, just bring yourself.
steps: Browse the schedule and choose a flow that fits your day.
Book online in seconds and we will save your mat.
Arrive, settle in, and let the practice carry you.

sections.quote: I came in stressed and stiff, and left lighter than I had felt in months. The teachers make everyone feel welcome, beginner or not.
sections.author: Sample Student

sections.sub: Try a class, then choose the rhythm that suits you.

items: I have never done yoga, is that ok?
Absolutely. Many of our classes are made for first-timers, and our teachers guide you every step of the way.
Do I need to bring my own mat?
No. We provide clean mats, blocks and props, though you are welcome to bring your own.
How do I book a class?
Reserve online in seconds. Just pick a session, tap book, and we will save your spot.
Comfortable clothes you can move in. Bare feet on the mat, and a water bottle if you like.
Yes. Monthly memberships can be paused anytime, no questions and no fees.

sections.sub: Join hundreds of students who made space for stillness in their week.

sections.tagline: A yoga and wellness studio for breath, movement and rest. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Calm is a sample template with dummy content
